title: carduus micropterus subsp. broteroi
intro: Carduus micropterus subsp. broteroi, also known as the thistle, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Carduus micropterus subsp. broteroi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
